Pirmajā daļā ir izskaidrots vispārējais evakuācijas princips un evakuācijas principi slēgtās telpās, nodrošinot vispārīgu tēmas kontekstu. Question 1: Chapters. Does the text list the main sections of the thesis? It says "divās galvenajās daļās – teorētiskajā un praktiskajā." Then within the theoretical part, it says "saturs ir sadalīts trīs daļās." It lists the three sub-sections: first, second, third. So yes, it lists main sections: theoretical and practical, and within theoretical, three sub-sections. So compliance: true. Feedback: mention that it lists main sections but could be clearer.

Question 2: Description. Does the text briefly describe contents of each section? It gives brief description: first part explains general evacuation principle, second part analyzes Xiaomi arena plans, third part looks at other studies. So yes, it describes contents. So compliance: true. Feedback: mention that description is brief but adequate.

Question 3: Structure. Can it be easily understood what is the general structure of the thesis just from this text? It says two main parts, theoretical and practical, and within theoretical, three subparts. But it doesn't mention practical part content. So maybe incomplete. But general structure: yes, two parts, theoretical subdivided into three. So maybe yes. But the practical part is not described. So maybe partially. The question: "Can it be easily understood what is the general structure of the thesis just from this text?" I'd say yes, you can see two main parts and subparts. So compliance: true. But we can note that practical part not described. But still structure is clear.

Thus all three comply: true. Provide feedback accordingly.
